skill.name: qwen-image-2-pro
skill.description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs.
skill.summary: Generate professional images with advanced text rendering using Alibaba's Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model via the inference.sh CLI platform.
skill.author: inferen-sh

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 56 patterns but all are false positives. External command detections are markdown documentation examples for the infsh CLI, not arbitrary code execution. Network URLs point to the legitimate inference.sh platform. The skill uses properly scoped allowed-tools: Bash(infsh *). No malicious patterns, prompt injection, or data exfiltration detected. Safe to publish with standard external command warnings.

low_findings.title: External Command Usage
low_findings.description: Skill uses bash commands via infsh CLI. All commands are scoped to infsh binary only through allowed-tools restriction. Commands shown in documentation are usage examples, not arbitrary execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The allowed-tools directive explicitly restricts bash access to infsh commands only, which is a legitimate and safe pattern for CLI wrapper skills.

low_findings.title: Network Requests to External Platform
low_findings.description: Skill makes network requests to inference.sh platform for image generation. URLs in documentation point to official platform endpoints and documentation resources.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network usage is expected and documented - this skill integrates with inference.sh platform for AI image generation services.

content.user_title: Generate AI images with professional text rendering
content.value_statement: Create high-quality images with accurate text display using Alibaba's advanced Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model. Perfect for marketing materials, posters, and designs requiring precise text control.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts with professional quality
Render accurate multi-line text within generated images
Create marketing banners and posters with precise text placement
Produce multiple image variations from a single prompt
Edit images using reference images for style transfer
Control output dimensions and use seeds for reproducibility
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI (infsh) to be installed and authenticated
Output dimensions constrained between 512x512 and 2048x2048 pixels
Maximum 6 images can be generated in a single request

use_cases.title: Marketing Material Creation
use_cases.description: Design professional banners, posters, and promotional graphics with accurately rendered text for campaigns and events.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing professionals and small business owners

use_cases.title: Logo and Brand Design
use_cases.description: Generate multiple logo concepts with company names and taglines rendered in various styles and fonts.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Create eye-catching social media posts and story graphics with overlay text for quotes, announcements, and promotions.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image with the prompt: "A serene mountain landscape at sunrise with a calm lake reflecting the peaks"
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - Create simple images without text

prompt_templates.title: Text-Heavy Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a poster with the title "Summer Festival" in large colorful letters at the top. Include the date "July 20-22, 2024" in smaller text below. Add decorative elements like sun and palm trees. Set prompt_extend to false for precise text control.
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - Generate images with specific text requirements

prompt_templates.title: Logo Design with Variations
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate 4 logo variations for a bakery called "Sweet Delights". Use warm colors and include a stylized cupcake icon. Set negative_prompt to avoid: "clipart, generic, boring design"

prompt_templates.title: Professional Marketing Banner
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 1920x1080 marketing banner with "GRAND OPENING" in bold white serif font at center on a gradient purple-to-gold background. Add "50% OFF Everything" in yellow below. Include elegant decorative borders. Use seed 42 for reproducibility and set watermark to false.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - Full control over dimensions, styling, and output

output_examples.input: Generate a poster with title "Welcome!" in bold blue text
output_examples.output: Returns a PNG image file featuring a welcoming design with prominently displayed blue text reading "Welcome!" in a bold font, suitable for events or greetings

output_examples.input: Create a futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying cars
output_examples.output: Returns a PNG image showing a detailed sci-fi city skyline with tall buildings, flying vehicles, and warm sunset colors reflecting off glass surfaces

best_practices: Use quotes around exact text that should appear in the image for precise rendering
Set prompt_extend to false when you need exact control over text placement and content
Include negative prompts like "blurry text, distorted text" to improve text quality
anti_patterns: Do not use prompts longer than 800 characters - they will be truncated
Avoid requesting dimensions outside the 512x512 to 2048x2048 range
Do not expect perfect text rendering on the first attempt - iterate with specific font and position details

faq.question: What is the difference between Qwen-Image and Qwen-Image-2-Pro?
faq.answer: Qwen-Image-2-Pro offers superior text rendering capabilities, better handling of complex prompts, and improved photorealistic details. Use Pro for text-heavy designs and standard Qwen-Image for general image generation.

faq.question: How do I get started with inference.sh?
faq.answer: Install the CLI using the inference-sh/skills@agent-tools skill, then run 'infsh login' to authenticate. You will need valid credentials for the inference.sh platform.

faq.question: Can I generate images without text?
faq.answer: Yes, the model works excellently for images without text. Simply provide a descriptive prompt without specifying text content, and it will generate the requested scene or object.

faq.question: How can I ensure consistent results across multiple generations?
faq.answer: Use the seed parameter with a specific integer value. The same seed with the same prompt will produce identical or very similar results each time.

faq.question: What file format are the output images?
faq.answer: Images are returned in PNG format, which provides lossless compression and is suitable for both web display and print applications.

faq.question: Can I edit existing images with this model?
faq.answer: Yes, you can provide reference images using the reference_images parameter for style transfer or image editing tasks. Include 1-3 input images along with your editing prompt.
